title: Break large tasks into smaller steps
description: Split assignments into small actions so they feel easier to begin.

title: Use a short focused study block
description: Work for 25 minutes on one topic, then take a short break before starting again.

title: Prioritise overdue work first
description: Deal with urgent deadlines before spending time on lower-priority tasks.

title: Review completed tasks weekly
description: Look back at what you finished to track progress and stay motivated.
